verse_text: But if I cast out demons with the finger of God, surely the kingdom of God has come upon you.

links.context: The finger of God is the Holy Spirit ([[MAT.12:28]]; [[LUK.11:20]]). The operation of the Spirit brought the lice upon Egypt, for the Father works through the Son and in the Spirit.
The finger of God is the Holy Spirit ([[MAT.12:28]]; [[LUK.11:20]]).
